summary: Machine-readable index for EU AI Act conformity automation and regulatory workflows: conformity assessment, technical documentation (Annex IV), risk management lifecycle, post-market monitoring, serious incident reporting, and the obligations-to-controls mapping. This bundle documents operator workflows and audit expectations; it does not change runtime verdict semantics, Rust enforcement, or database migrations.
non_goals: Does not certify conformity with the EU AI Act; conformity assessment is the responsibility of qualified assessors and notified bodies where applicable.
Does not assign legal liability or substitute for legal counsel.
Does not modify compliance verdict labels, Rust runtime enforcement, or database migrations.
Does not replace operator-owned record-keeping, registration with EU databases, or notified body procedures.
